theme_and_archetype.description: A high-end, minimalist e-commerce design inspired by major fashion brands. It relies heavily on generous white space, high-contrast monochrome tones, delicate serif headings paired with clean sans-serif body text, and large editorial-style imagery.

rules: Use sharp edges (rounded-none) for most product images and containers to maintain a high-fashion look.
Buttons should be sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-sm) with solid black background.
Hero sections should be full-bleed or use a split 50/50 layout.
Product lists should be cardless with borderless images and text aligned left underneath.
Use generous padding between sections to let the content breathe.

navigation.style: Glassmorphism on scroll or solid white background with bottom border. High contrast links.
navigation.elements: Logo left, Links center, Icons (Search, User, Heart, Cart) right.

hero_banner.style: Full viewport height or 80vh. High quality image, minimal text overlay, distinct primary CTA button. Overlay should be subtle.

product_card.style: Borderless image container. Image fills width. Below image: Title, Price, small color swatches. No visible card background.
product_card.interaction: Image zoom on hover using group-hover scale transform.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white px-8 py-3 hover:bg-stone-800 transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-black text-black px-8 py-3 hover:bg-stone-100 transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-sm

badges.promo: bg-stone-100 text-stone-800 text-xs px-2 py-1 uppercase tracking-wider
badges.sale: bg-red-50 text-red-600 text-xs px-2 py-1 uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold

inputs.style: Minimalist. border-b border-stone-300 rounded-none bg-transparent focus:border-black focus:ring-0 px-0 py-2 transition-colors.

hero.description: Woman in beige suit sitting on a white chair, perfect for minimalist fashion hero.

categories.description: Stylish fashion portrait in black and white.
Man with beard wearing white henley shirt and black pants.
Chic beige handbag featuring floral elements.

products.description: Man in black t-shirt and shorts with sunglasses.
Close-up of pink pants and white sneakers in a studio setting.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Use pure black background for main CTA buttons.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Work Sans' for body text. Ensure these fonts are loaded via Google Fonts in index.html.
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image URLs. Only use the images provided in the media section.
Build the hero section with a large image and minimal, elegant typography overlaid on it, use dark/light text appropriately based on the image.
Ensure the navigation is always visible, either sticky or fixed, to allow easy access to cart and search.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust testing.
Implement Shadcn UI for dropdowns, modals, tabs, and forms, but strip excessive borders and rounding to match the minimalist luxury theme.
For the cart and payment pages, maintain a clean, distraction-free layout to optimize conversions.
Use Lucide React for icons. Keep icon stroke-width thin (e.g., 1.5) for elegance.
